name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Som (Sour Soup Curry Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the 7 dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and deseed them.
2. Put all ingredients except the shrimp paste into a blender and blend until mixed well.
3. Add the shrimp paste to the blender and blend once more to obtain about half a cup of fine-textured paste.
4. Store the paste in a glass jar in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 months.
(Note: Krachai is related to ginger and galangal, and is typically used in fish dishes.)
